title: Resource
description: An external resource for retirement-related information, such as articles, videos, or official government portals.

destination.description: The id of the destination this resource pertains to.

examples: Greece Country Guide - Pros and Cons of Living in Greece 2025

description.description: A concise summary of what the resource provides and its relevance to the user.
examples: This website provides a comprehensive guide to living in Greece, emphasizing its appeal as an affordable and culturally rich destination for expats.

url.description: The direct URL to the resource.

author.description: The person or organization that created the resource.

platform.description: The platform or site hosting the resource.

date.description: The publication or last updated date of the resource in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tags.description: Categories or keywords associated with the resource to facilitate filtering.
